item.title: BAHRAIN’S AIR DEFENSES INTERCEPTED AND DESTROYED SEVERAL IRANIAN AERIAL ATTACKS ON TUESDAY, THE BAHRAIN DEFENSE FORCE SAID. THE MILITARY ACCUSED IRAN OF ENDANGERING CIVILIANS THROUGH ATTACKS INVOLVING
item.description: pBAHRAIN’S AIR DEFENSES INTERCEPTED AND DESTROYED SEVERAL IRANIAN AERIAL ATTACKS ON TUESDAY, THE BAHRAIN DEFENSE FORCE SAID. THE MILITARY ACCUSED IRAN OF ENDANGERING CIVILIANS THROUGH ATTACKS INVOLVING MISSILES AND DRONES AND URGED THE PUBLIC NOT TO APPROACH DEBRIS OR UNIDENTIFIED OBJECTS. .../p

item.title: ECB’S LENDING SURVEY: EURO ZONE BANKS TIGHTENED CREDIT STANDARDS IN Q2 ON GEOPOLITICAL, ENERGY PRICE CONCERNS CORPORATE LOAN DEMAND ROSE IN Q2 BUT SHARE OF REJECTED LOAN APPLICATIONS INCREASED HOUSING
item.description: pECB’S LENDING SURVEY: EURO ZONE BANKS TIGHTENED CREDIT STANDARDS IN Q2 ON GEOPOLITICAL, ENERGY PRICE CONCERNSbr /br /CORPORATE LOAN DEMAND ROSE IN Q2 BUT SHARE OF REJECTED LOAN APPLICATIONS INCREASEDbr /br / HOUSING LOAN DEMAND FELL SHARPLY IN Q2 AND FURTHER DROP SEEN IN Q3 BANKS SEE FURTHER TIGHTE

item.title: MORNING ALL! - US PRESIDENT TRUMP IS EXPECTED TO DECIDE IN THE COMING DAYS WHETHER TO EXPAND MILITARY OPERATIONS AGAINST IRAN AND RETURN TO FULL-SCALE COMBAT, A SENIOR US OFFICIAL TOLD FOX NEWS. - SEN
item.description: pMORNING ALL&#33;br /br /- US PRESIDENT TRUMP IS EXPECTED TO DECIDE IN THE COMING DAYS WHETHER TO EXPAND MILITARY OPERATIONS AGAINST IRAN AND RETURN TO FULL-SCALE COMBAT, A SENIOR US OFFICIAL TOLD FOX NEWS.br /br /- SENIOR US AND ISRAELI OFFICIALS ARE CLAIMING TRUMP ONLY HAS TWO REALISTIC OPTIONS: E

item.title: RT by @nono2357: 🇮🇷 Or, dollars, USDT : comment l’Iran et sa banque centrale contournent l’effondrement du rial ? Face à une inflation à 68%, les iraniens se réfugient dans l'or et l'USDT, comme leur
item.description: p🇮🇷 Or, dollars, USDT : comment l’Iran et sa banque centrale contournent l’effondrement du rial ?br /br /Face à une inflation à 68%, les iraniens se réfugient dans l'or et l'USDT, comme leur propre Banque centrale.br /br /Notre article 👇br /br /a href="https://journalducoin.com/economie/or-dollars-u
